ocr_findings.description: The year/edition badge '令和6年度 / 2024' is rendered as a 3-column markdown table; layout differs from the hexagon badge in the image but all text values are present and correct.

reviewer_notes: Cover page with exam name, year (令和6年度 / 2024), subtitle, author name, publisher logo, and syllabus version. All text elements captured correctly. The decorative hexagon badge is approximated as a table — acceptable for a cover page. No content loss.
